If your story has no period's It will be

 please keep this in mind.

Stupid storie's if it just doesn't make sense it's going to be (erased).

Storie's with a lot of blank's will be rejected!

write a good story it will pay off in the end.
(05) multiple parts storie's:
Multi-part storie's are great fun to write but each segment have to stand on its own.
 it has to be long enough.

You are not allowed to write other people's stuff specially if its copyrighted .
you must come up with original work!

we're all on here to have fun.
 if you are an ass to someone we will have to take appropriate measures .
you cannot harass verbally or sexually...

As we slip into the hot tub together throwing our clothes off to the side it's more than hot !
as I sit on your lap breathing into your ear kissing your nose and sucking on your lips.
All I want to suck on is your tongue,
 and reach down deep into the bubble's to see how much you like it ;)
I'm not into lying but I've known that you've been lying to me for years !
Lovingly sucking on your tongue I slowly move away locking eye's with you.
 I give you a loving smile as I grab your shoulders to push you into the water.
At first you smiles thinking I'm pushing you down under the water for a reason :)
 and then your smile disappears.
As I gave you a loving smile I hold you down under the water and your feet kick behind us splashing water everywhere!!! your hand's can't grip the side of the hot tub.... it's too slick !
 as you scream underwater .
I just hold you down tiger.
It's what you deserve my love.
I love you.
But you so deserve this as I give you a loving smile drowning you as I look into your scared eye's in the water under the bubble's
It started to rain as I drug you're naked limp body out of the hot tub.
 dragging you naked across the backyard I simply didn't care grabbing a shovel that was leaning against the garage.
 I dug a hole in the backyard naked myself in the rain enjoying the thought that you will no longer be around!
                                                 Lisa   Lee
